privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic OAuth2 application named 'SkyLinks GCS' with confidential client type and client-credentials authorization grant type, owned by the admin user. The credentials are saved to /home/ga/Documents/skylinks_creds.txt in a specific format (Client ID and Client Secret). All metadata claims are verified against the task description, implementation scripts, verifier logic, and OAuth2/Django OAuth Toolkit standards.
